name: GLOBAL PAYMENTS INC
summary: Global Payments Inc. is a payments technology company that provides payment processing and software solutions. The company recently completed the acquisition of Worldpay and divested its Issuer Solutions business. Global Payments offers services spanning merchant acquiring, payment processing platforms, and related financial technology services to businesses and financial institutions across multiple geographies.

products.name: Issuer Solutions
products.description: Issuer-focused payment solutions business, recently divested by Global Payments.

products.name: Worldpay
products.description: Payment processing platform recently acquired by Global Payments.
